patch.value: Groups the multi-agent concurrency-safety backlog surfaced by the 2026-07-03 concurrency audit (integrity solid under parallel stress; five race/atomicity gaps filed). pm is agent-first: many agents mutate one git-backed workspace concurrently, so locking, claim semantics, and singleton-file writes must be safe by construction. Philosophy: project management = context management — concurrent context must never be silently lost.

All findings from the 2026-07-03 concurrency audit are resolved or explicitly waived: atomic claim test-and-set, bounded lock-wait retry, singleton-file locking, ID-allocation TOCTOU guard, stale-lock takeover race. Parallel multi-agent stress (mutations, claims, config writes) preserves item and history integrity with zero silent lost updates.

## Charter
Capability epic for concurrency & multi-agent safety, created from the 2026-07-03 concurrency audit. pm is agent-first: many agents mutate one git-backed workspace in parallel, so locking, claim semantics, id allocation, and singleton-file writes must be safe by construction. Audit verdict: data integrity held under all parallel stress (no corruption, no history drift) — the five children are availability/atomicity gaps, not corruption bugs.

## Delivery order (dependency-informed)
1. pm-2muu lock-wait retry (in progress, implemented uncommitted) — foundation: gives every mutation a bounded wait.
2. pm-8t5x claim test-and-set (in progress, implemented uncommitted) — relies on the item lock; with 2muu it is a true atomic test-and-set.
3. pm-zwib stale-lock takeover race — related to 2muu (its removal cap bounds but does not fix the race).
4. pm-khdq create/copy ID allocation TOCTOU (silent item overwrite — worst blast radius).
5. pm-bgcu singleton-file (settings/schema/session/checkpoints) lock-free read-modify-write.

## Verification bar
Every child closes with parallel-stress evidence recorded via pm test / notes (the audit's empirical repros re-run green): N-parallel mutations self-heal, claims are exclusive, no lost config writes, no id collisions.

## Boundary note 2026-07-06
Scale-out initiative pm-9rxu (under pm-o2kc) owns claim/lock THROUGHPUT at thousands of agents (child pm-lvyd). This epic keeps correctness races at any N (pm-zwib, pm-khdq, pm-bgcu) — they are prerequisites for meaningful throughput numbers.
